html:
Exclusive to:  

The Floral Shirt, also colloquially known as Hawaiian Shirt, is a craftable Dress item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 3 Papyrus, 3 Silk, and 5 Cactus Flowers to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It restores 3.3 Sanity/min and provides 240 points of protection from Overheating while worn.

The Floral Shirt spoils after 15 days similarly to the Fashion Melon and the Garland instead of losing durability as it's worn, thus it cannot be repaired with a Sewing Kit. Storing it inside an Insulated Pack or Snow Chester will slow its spoilage rate.  

Since the item requires Cactus Flowers to be crafted, it cannot be crafted until the first Summer. Unfortunately, it only lasts for 12 days after that, due to the 25% faster spoilage during Summer.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Distinguished
Florrible Shirt
A shirt fit for bloom and doom.
Woven - Distinguished
Eye-land Shirt
This shirt will have all eyes on you.
Woven - Distinguished
Calm Palm Shirt
Relax, everything's fine...
Woven - Distinguished
Palms-at-Dusk Shirt
Nothing's more beautiful than palms at dusk... now find some light.
Woven - Distinguished
Crimson Hibiscus Shirt
The perfect shirt to hide your wounds!

Trivia

  • The Floral Shirt used to be crafted using Petals, Silk, and Butterfly Wings, and it wasn't as effective against heat.
  • Even though it requires a Cactus Flower to craft (suggesting that is the flower on the shirt), typical "Hawaiian" shirts depict the Hibiscus, the Hawaiian state flower.

Exclusive to:
“It's not lab safe!”
–Wilson
“I wonder if it'd burn as nicely as actual flowers do.”
–Willow
“Is vacation shirt.”
–Wolfgang
“They'll put flowers on anything these days.”
–Wendy
“ROBOTS HAVE CASUAL DRESS EVERYDAY”
–WX-78
“I prefer tweed.”
–Wickerbottom
“I really prefer plaid.”
–Woodie
“The dapperest of them all.”
–Maxwell
“The flowers have fused into a pattern! Fascinating!”
–Wagstaff
“Flöwers cannöt stöp a spear.”
–Wigfrid
“Grandpa's style, definitely.”
–Webber
“This shirt is so me.”
–Walani
“When in Rome...”
–Warly
“'Tis light an stylish.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS WILBA CASUAL LOOK”
–Wilba
“Breezy”
–Wormwood
“Still smells like flowers.”
–Wheeler
“That's one loud shirt.”
–Winona
“Oh no, that's not really my style.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, there flowers all over!”
–Wurt
“This DEFINITELY wouldn't pass uniform inspection.”
–Walter
“It might be nice to kick back and unwind... for a minute or two.”
–Wanda
The Floral Shirt, also colloquially known as Hawaiian Shirt, is a craftable Dress item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 3 Papyrus, 3 Silk, and 5 Cactus Flowers to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It restores 3.3 Sanity/min and provides 240 points of protection from Overheating while worn.
The Floral Shirt spoils after 15 days similarly to the Fashion Melon and the Garland instead of losing durability as it's worn, thus it cannot be repaired with a Sewing Kit. Storing it inside an Insulated Pack or Snow Chester will slow its spoilage rate.
Since the item requires Cactus Flowers to be crafted, it cannot be crafted until the first Summer. Unfortunately, it only lasts for 12 days after that, due to the 25% faster spoilage during Summer.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Áo Sơ Mi Hoa, còn được gọi thông tục là Áo Sơ Mi Hawaii, là một trang phục có thể chế tạo từ DLC Reign of Giants. Nó cần 3 Giấy Cói, 3 Tơ và 5 Hoa Xương Rồng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Nó phục hồi 3,3 Tinh Thần/phút và cung cấp 240 điểm bảo vệ khỏi Quá Nhiệt khi đeo.
